instruction: Part of this code bracket icon is clipped. Restore the canvas to 128x128.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 72 72" width="72" height="72">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="72" height="72" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/code-bracket.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 6.75 22.5 12l-5.25 5.25m-10.5 0L1.5 12l5.25-5.25m7.5-3-4.5 16.5"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/code-bracket.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 6.75 22.5 12l-5.25 5.25m-10.5 0L1.5 12l5.25-5.25m7.5-3-4.5 16.5"/></g>
</svg>
